// about: Copy this to sites/<your-site>/config.json and fill it in. One file per site; everything else (code) is shared. Easiest path: run `foyer new` for guided onboarding (it creates the D1 db, Pages project, secrets, Supabase entry, then builds & deploys).
name: Your Site Name
// name: Public display + meta/title fallback (the live name can still be overridden in the admin panel / D1 site_settings).
// domain: Bare domain, no protocol. Used for canonical/OG/Twitter URLs and the JS meta origin.
// themeColor: Accent color → browser UI theme, PWA theme_color, and the site accent CSS var.
// accentBright: Brighter accent for highlights/glows. Defaults to themeColor.
// mutedRgb: R,G,B for muted/secondary text (CSS --site-muted-rgb). Defaults to 180,230,190.
// publicAccess: Set true to permanently open the site (no OAuth/magic-link gate), regardless of the admin 'site public' toggle. Enforced client-side (boot) and server-side (FOYER_PUBLIC var in wrangler.toml). Omit or false to keep the gate.
// captcha: Gate bot-check provider: 'turnstile' (Cloudflare) or 'recaptcha' (Google v2 checkbox). Set the matching site key as a Cloudflare secret — TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY or RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY. Omit/blank = auto (use whichever key is set).
// cloudflare: Used by build/deploy (Pages project + D1 target) and to generate wrangler.toml (which wires the D1 binding on deploy). SECRETS (OAuth client secrets, RESEND_API_KEY, ADMIN_PASSWORD, TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY) are NEVER stored here — set them as Cloudflare encrypted secrets per project (foyer new does this for you). Public OAuth client IDs (GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GITHUB_CLIENT_ID, DISCORD_CLIENT_ID) are also set as project secrets/env.
